title: Quran Discs
description: Adds Playable Quran Discs (music discs) to Minecraft!
body:
The "Quran Discs" mod enriches your Minecraft experience by adding 30+ special music discs featuring Surahs from the Quran, beautifully recited by **Mishary Al Afasy**. The discs included are:

- **Surah Al-Fatihah**
- **Surah An-Nas**
- **Surah Al-Falaq**
- **Surah Al-Ikhlas**
- **Surah Al-Masad**
- **Surah An-Nasr**
- **And much more!**

![The Discs in Creative](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23398763b052d347fc5a7b76b9962d6e350b5909.png)

### Key Features:
- **Sheikh Villager**: A villager is assigned as the Sheikh when it is close to a **Chiseled Bookshelf** (a Target block for 1.19.4). Interact with the Sheikh Villager to trade for each Quran disc for just **1 emerald**.  
![Sheikh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37f6d9db503c152cadbfd6ac6612b13fa13fcdcb.png)
- **Beautiful Recitations**: Enjoy the calming and uplifting recitations as you explore your world.
- **Requires Jukeboxes**: Use jukeboxes to play the Quran discs.

Enhance your Minecraft journey with the profound beauty of the Quran through the "Quran Discs" mod!
